zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Braose於大約1135年出生在英國素可布拉波時，她的父親William de Braose II24歲，母親Bertha of Gloucester21歲。她與William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年2月5日之後在英國盧特藍德歐阿哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Braose于大约1135年出生在英国素可布拉波时，她的父亲William de Braose II24岁，母亲Bertha of Gloucester21岁。她与William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1228年2月5日之后在英国盧特藍德歐阿哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Braose was born about 1135, in Bramber, Sussex, England, her father, William de Braose II, was 24 and her mother, Bertha of Gloucester, was 21. She married William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died after 5 February 1228, in Oakham, Rutland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Braose est née environ 1135, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Braose II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Bertha of Gloucester, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 5 février 1228, à Oakham, Rutland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Braose um 1135 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Braose II 24 und ihre Mutter Bertha of Gloucester 21. Sie hat William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 5. Februar 1228 in Oakham, Rutland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Braose è nata il circa 1135 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Braose II, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Bertha of Gloucester, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 5 febbraio 1228, nel Oakham, Rutland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Braoseが約1135年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Braose IIは24歳，母Bertha of Gloucesterは21歳であった。William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年2月5日以後にイギリスルトランドオアクハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Braose(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha of Gloucester(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 2월 5일 이후 영국 루틀랜드 카에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Braose II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Bertha of Gloucester, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 5 de fevereiro de 1228, em Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Braose родилась около 1135 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Braose II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha of Gloucester, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 5 февраль 1228 г. в местности оахам, рутланд, Англия.

sm.about 1135–Aft 5 February 1228: e tusa o le 1135–ina ua ma'ea le 5 Fepuari 1228

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Braose nació aproximadamente 1135, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Braose II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Bertha of Gloucester, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de 5 de febrero de 1228, en Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra.
